feed.title: SkillsLLM

author.name: SkillsLLM & the MCP / Claude Skills ecosystem

feed.subtitle: AI tooling news and guides: SkillsLLM, Desktop Commander, Model Context Protocol, FastMCP, ClaudePluginHub, MCP Servers blog, Claude Skills Hub, OpenRouter, LiteLLM (blog + releases), and Glama MCP Servers

entry.title: July Townhall: Product + Roadmap Updates
entry.content: Join the LiteLLM July townhall on Thursday, 23 July at 7:30 AM PT to learn about LiteLLM's product updates and roadmap.

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: akm-mcp
entry.content: akm-mcp

entry.title: auto-superpowers
entry.content: Autonomous fork of superpowers: spec → plan → execute workflow without interactive prompts

entry.title: dx
entry.content: Developer experience essentials: GitHub Actions debugging, conversation cloning/half-cloning, context handoffs, and Reddit research via Gemini CLI

entry.title: dx
entry.content: Developer experience essentials: GitHub Actions debugging, conversation cloning/half-cloning, context handoffs, and Reddit research via Gemini CLI

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: plannotator-effective-html
entry.content: plannotator-effective-html — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: claude-delegator
entry.content: GPT and Gemini expert subagents for Claude Code via Codex, Gemini, or Copilot CLI. Five specialized experts: Architect, Plan Reviewer, Scope Analyst, Code Reviewer, Security Analyst.

entry.title: claude-obsidian
entry.content: Claude + Obsidian ナレッジコンパニオン(日本語ローカライズ版)。永続的に成長するウィキ Vault を構築。メモリ管理、セッションノート、知識整理、プロジェクト横断エージェントコンテキストを扱う。Andrej Karpathy の LLM Wiki パターンに基づく。オプションの DragonScale Memory 拡張で階層的 log fold、決定論的ページアドレス、埋め込みベースのセマンティックタイリング lint、境界優先 autoresearch を追加。すべての出力は日本語、ファイル名・キーは英語維持。Claude + Obsidian knowledge companion (Japanese-localized). Triggers in both Japanese and English.

entry.title: zerion-agent
entry.content: Zerion skills and slash commands for AI coding agents — wallet analysis, swaps/bridges, chain reference, agent-token policies.

entry.title: north-star
entry.content: A 260-token system prompt that overrides three structural presumptions every RLHF-trained LLM inherits from training: that you want confirmation, that old scarcity still applies, that best practices are ceilings.

entry.title: cli-printing-press
entry.content: Generate production Go CLIs from API descriptions or OpenAPI specs

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Production-grade engineering skills for AI coding agents — covering the full software development lifecycle from spec to ship.

entry.title: planning-with-files
entry.content: Manus-style persistent markdown files for planning, progress tracking, and knowledge storage. Includes hooks for automatic plan re-reading and completion verification. Use when starting complex tasks, multi-step projects, research tasks, or when you want structured output.

entry.title: task-orchestrator
entry.content: Claude Code integration for MCP Task Orchestrator — schema-aware context, note-driven workflow

entry.title: oma
entry.content: Portable multi-agent harness for .agents-based skills and workflows across Claude Code, Codex, Gemini, and more

entry.title: huggingface-skills
entry.content: Agent Skills for AI/ML tasks including dataset creation, model training, evaluation, and research paper publishing on Hugging Face Hub

entry.title: grafana
entry.content: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for Grafana providing access to dashboards, datasources, and querying capabilities

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: wiri
entry.content: wiri

entry.title: minutes
entry.content: Conversation memory for AI assistants — record, transcribe, search meetings and voice memos. 19 skills + 1 agent + 2 hooks.

entry.title: azure
entry.content: Microsoft Azure MCP and Skills integration for cloud resource management, deployments, and Azure services. Manage your Azure infrastructure, monitor applications, and deploy resources directly from Claude Code.

entry.title: mempalace
entry.content: Give your AI a memory — mine projects and conversations into a searchable palace. 19 MCP tools, auto-save hooks, and guided setup.

entry.title: caveman
entry.content: Ultra-compressed communication mode. Cuts ~75% of tokens while keeping full technical accuracy by speaking like a caveman.

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: compound-engineering
entry.content: Brainstorm, plan, debug, review, and compound learnings with AI agents

entry.title: pm-skills-bundle
entry.content: All 46 PM skills at once — discovery, strategy, finance, career, and more.

entry.title: scout
entry.content: Deterministic security scanner for AI-assisted coding. Runs Scout as an agent-callable verifier (scan -> fix -> rescan) with no inference cost.

entry.title: cortex
entry.content: Native Zig local memory for Claude Code with MCP tools, Markdown wiki storage, and session checkpoints.

entry.title: beads
entry.content: AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows. Manage tasks, discover work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.

entry.title: claude-dashboard
entry.content: Comprehensive status line with context usage, API rate limits, and cost tracking

entry.title: coach
entry.content: Self-improving learning system that detects friction signals (corrections, repetitions, tool failures), extracts improvement candidates, and proposes rule/skill updates with explicit approval workflow.

entry.title: woz
entry.content: WozCode enhanced coding tools — smart search, batch editing, SQL introspection, and cost-optimized subagent delegation

entry.title: socraticode
entry.content: Codebase intelligence — semantic search workflows, dependency graph analysis, and context artifact exploration for SocratiCode

entry.title: apd
entry.content: APD (Autopilot Development) Framework - AI自律開発フレームワーク。人間は意思決定だけ、AIが自律で完走する。

entry.title: hyperframes
entry.content: HyperFrames by HeyGen. Write HTML, render video. Compositions, GSAP and runtime adapter animations, captions, voiceovers, audio-reactive visuals, and website capture for HyperFrames.

entry.title: buildkite
entry.content: Official Buildkite skills for Claude Code, Cursor, and other AI coding agents — pipelines, migration, preflight, agent runtime, CLI, and API

entry.title: carta-crm
entry.content: Manage the Carta CRM conversationally — search, add, update, and enrich investors, companies, contacts, deals, notes, and fundraisings via the Carta CRM MCP Server

entry.title: cache-components
entry.content: Expert guidance for Next.js Cache Components and Partial Prerendering (PPR). Proactively activates in projects with cacheComponents: true, providing patterns for 'use cache' directive, cacheLife(), cacheTag(), cache invalidation, and parameter permutation rendering.

entry.title: netsuite-suitecloud
entry.content: NetSuite agent skills from Oracle — authoring guidance for SuiteCloud Development Framework (SDF) objects and UIF single-page-app components, plus runtime guidance for the NetSuite AI Service Connector.

entry.title: agentforce-adlc
entry.content: Agentforce Agent Development Life Cycle — author, discover, scaffold, deploy, test, secure, and optimize .agent files

entry.title: netlify-skills
entry.content: Netlify platform skills for Claude Code

entry.title: cockroachdb
entry.content: Connect Claude Code directly to your CockroachDB clusters for hands-on database work — explore schemas, write optimized SQL, debug queries, and manage distributed database clusters. This plugin provides tools across MCP backends (self-hosted MCP Toolbox and managed CockroachDB Cloud MCP Server), specialized agents (DBA, Developer, Operator), skills across operational domains, and built-in safety hooks.

entry.title: sentry
entry.content: Sentry error monitoring integration. Access error reports, analyze stack traces, search issues by fingerprint, and debug production errors directly from your development environment.

entry.title: stripe
entry.content: Stripe development plugin for Claude

entry.title: Console CensorChecker
entry.content: Console CensorChecker

entry.title: everything-claude-code
entry.content: The most comprehensive Claude Code plugin — 14+ agents, 56+ skills, 33+ commands, and production-ready hooks for TDD, security scanning, code review, and continuous learning

entry.title: tin
entry.content: Thread-based version control for conversational coding. Links AI conversation threads to git commits for code review context.

entry.title: fullstack-dev-skills
entry.content: Comprehensive skill pack with 66 specialized skills for full-stack developers: 12 language experts (Python, TypeScript, Go, Rust, C++, Swift, Kotlin, C#, PHP, Java, SQL, JavaScript), 10 backend frameworks, 6 frontend/mobile, plus infrastructure, DevOps, security, and testing. Features progressive disclosure architecture for 50% faster loading.

entry.title: n8n-mcp-skills
entry.content: Expert skills for building n8n workflows with n8n-mcp

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: deepeval
entry.content: Skills for adding DeepEval evaluations, tracing, datasets, Confident AI reports, and iterative improvement loops to AI applications.

entry.content: AI-supervised issue tracker for coding workflows. Manage tasks, discover work, and maintain context with simple CLI commands.

entry.title: MCP-SynClub-Generate-Comic

entry.title: v1.90.5
entry.content:
Verify Docker Image Signature

All LiteLLM Docker images are signed with cosign. Every release is signed with the same key introduced in commit 0112e53.

Verify using the pinned commit hash (recommended):

A commit hash is cryptographically immutable, so this is the strongest way to ensure you are using the original signing key:

cosign verify \
  --key https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BerriAI/litellm/0112e53046018d726492c814b3644b7d376029d0/cosign.pub \
  ghcr.io/berriai/litellm:v1.90.5

Verify using the release tag (convenience):

Tags are protected in this repository and resolve to the same key. This option is easier to read but relies on tag protection rules:

cosign verify \
  --key https://raw.githubusercontent.com/BerriAI/litellm/v1.90.5/cosign.pub \
  ghcr.io/berriai/litellm:v1.90.5

Expected output:

The following checks were performed on each of these signatures:
  - The cosign claims were validated
  - The signatures were verified against the specified public key

What's Changed

  • chore(release): backport #33592 to stable/1.90.x and cut 1.90.5 by @yuneng-berri in #33610

Full Changelog: v1.90.4...v1.90.5

entry.title: oh-my-claudecode
entry.content: Multi-agent orchestration system for Claude Code

entry.title: engram
entry.content: Evidence-based learning engine: first-principles curricula, generation-first Socratic tutoring, free-recall verification with receipts, FSRS-scheduled memory, and interactive explorable artifacts. Learn anything; keep it.

entry.title: cartog
entry.content: Code graph navigation and semantic search for LLM coding agents

entry.title: ponytail
entry.content: Lazy senior dev mode. Forces the simplest, shortest solution that actually works: YAGNI, stdlib first, no unrequested abstractions.

entry.title: alternate-cloud
entry.content: Deploy and manage workloads on Alternate Clouds (Akash + Spheron + Phala TEE) from any AI coding assistant. Bundles the `ac` CLI reference plus task-specific skills for static sites, Docker apps, templates, raw servers, and troubleshooting.

entry.title: rocm
entry.content: AMD ROCm 7.2.4 GPU computing stack: HIP kernel development, rocBLAS/rocFFT/rocRAND/rocSOLVER compute libraries, profiling, and CUDA-to-HIP porting

entry.title: notification-sound
entry.content: Plays a notification sound on any Claude Code notification

entry.title: huggingface-skills
entry.content: Core Hugging Face Hub operations through the hf CLI, including skill installation, repo management, jobs, datasets, models, Spaces, and discovery.

entry.title: skills
entry.content: skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: ccc-skills
entry.content: Collection of skills and commands: Excalidraw diagrams, Streak challenge tracker, agentic system design, self-improving systems, htmldrop HTML sharing, landing page GTM, UAT testing, cross-app shared auth, Google Analytics (GA4) setup, Meta Pixel setup, project showcase catalog, and the pitch suite (pitch-craft timed scripts, demo-video recording, pitch-deck, pitch-package orchestration)

entry.title: typemux-cc
entry.content: Python type-checker LSP multiplexer for Claude Code (pyright, ty, pyrefly)

entry.title: code-review
entry.content: Automated code review for local uncommitted or unpushed changes using multi-agent confidence-based scoring

entry.title: dev-core
entry.content: 意思決定grill、証拠ベース計画、永続的な自律実行、TDD、独立レビュー、Hooks自動化、systematic debuggingを提供する開発フレームワーク。

entry.title: ggml
entry.content: ggml v0.15.3 C tensor library skill — 650+ functions and 98 ops for graph computation, GGUF I/O, multi-backend inference, GLU activations, SSM/RWKV ops, and ML training

entry.title: chrome-bookmarks-mcp
entry.content: Manage Chrome's synced bookmarks from Claude — list, search, add, move, rename, dedupe, and reorganize folders. Edits go through chrome.bookmarks via a companion extension, so they sync durably.

entry.title: cuda
entry.content: NVIDIA CUDA C/C++ skill - Runtime API, cuBLAS, cuFFT, cuSPARSE, cuRAND, cuSolver, Thrust, and Cooperative Groups for GPU-accelerated computing

entry.title: ai-statusline
entry.content: AI-powered status line customization - Enhances Claude Code's native /statusline command with visual progress bars, 5h/7d rate-limit display, reasoning-effort level with /effort-matched colors and ultracode detection, cost and duration segments, granular display toggles, and an interactive edit wizard

entry.title: memory-bank
entry.content: Semantic search for Claude Code conversations. Remember past discussions, decisions, and patterns.

entry.title: finplan
entry.content: Personal finance projection engine — Monte Carlo projections, tax calculations, retirement planning, Social Security analysis, and interactive dashboards. Powered by 60+ MCP tools.

entry.title: powergridmodel
entry.content: power-grid-model Python skill - high-performance steady-state distribution power system analysis: power flow, state estimation, and IEC 60909 short-circuit calculations with 22 component types and batch/parallel computation

entry.title: opencl
entry.content: OpenCL SDK (Khronos Group) v2026.05.29 (OpenCL 3.1) C/C++ skill — cross-platform GPU/CPU parallel computing with ~60 C API functions, C++ wrapper, and SDK utilities

entry.title: make-skills
entry.content: Expert skills for designing, building, and deploying Make.com automation scenarios — for Claude Code and other AI agents

entry.title: greycat
entry.content: Comprehensive GreyCat development skill for graph-based language with built-in persistence. Covers data modeling, API development, parallel processing, frontend integration, and all standard libraries.

entry.title: academic-research-skills
entry.content: Production-grade academic research pipeline for Claude Code: research → write → review → revise → finalize. 4 skills, 35+ modes, 38-agent ensemble, v3.7.3 + v3.8 L3 claim-faithfulness gate, v3.9.0 cross-index triangulation, v3.10 triangulation policy layer, v3.11 deterministic citation verification gate (#182).

entry.title: dx
entry.content: Developer experience essentials: GitHub Actions debugging, conversation half-cloning, context handoffs, research (Reddit and Hacker News), private GitHub search, and Claude Code version checks

entry.title: kmgraph
entry.content: Structured knowledge capture, lesson-learned documentation, and cross-session memory for Claude Code projects. Includes KG entries, ADRs, meta-issue tracking, chat extraction, and profile-file rule capture.

entry.title: pandapower
entry.content: pandapower v3.4.0 Python skill - power systems analysis with 80+ functions for AC/DC power flow, OPF, short circuit (IEC 60909), and state estimation

entry.title: razorback
entry.content: Miller-powered development workflow with subagent-driven execution, inline review, and Miller-first codebase orientation.

entry.title: ollama
entry.content: Run and manage local LLMs via Ollama's REST API, with support for text generation, chat, embeddings, and custom model creation.

entry.title: vllm
entry.content: vLLM v0.19.0 skill: offline batch inference, OpenAI-compatible server, LoRA adapters, multimodal inputs, embeddings, classification, structured outputs, and tool calling.

entry.title: takt
entry.content: TAKT workflow engine skills for multi-agent orchestration. Includes analyzers, builders, and optimizers for TAKT workflow YAML.

entry.title: vitaecontext
entry.content: VitaeContext gives AI agents a private, reusable source of truth about a person's career, then provides focused skills for turning that context into grounded professional work.

entry.title: agent-skills
entry.content: Collection of agent skills demonstrating various capabilities including skill creation, MCP building, visual design, algorithmic art, internal communications, web testing, artifact building, Slack GIFs, and theme styling

entry.title: blas_lapack
entry.content: Complete CBLAS and LAPACKE C API reference (LAPACK v3.12.1) covering 1284 functions across BLAS Level 1/2/3 vector and matrix operations, linear system solvers, eigenvalue/eigenvector computation, SVD, least squares, matrix factorizations, and auxiliary routines for scientific computing and high-performance numerical linear algebra.

entry.title: llamacpp
entry.content: Complete llama.cpp C/C++ API reference (v b7885) covering 198 functions: model loading, inference, text generation, embeddings, chat, advanced sampling (XTC, DRY, infill), per-sequence state management, model type detection, and more. For GGUF models, local LLM inference, and C/C++ AI development.

entry.title: greycat-c
entry.content: Comprehensive reference for GreyCat C API and GCL Standard Library. Covers native function implementation, tensor operations, scheduling, I/O, statistics, and all std modules.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,642 supported skills.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,315 supported skills.

entry.title: ecc
entry.content: Harness-native ECC plugin for engineering teams - 67 agents, 278 skills, 94 legacy command shims, reusable hooks, rules, MCP conventions, and operator workflows for Claude Code plus adjacent agent harnesses

entry.title: skilled
entry.content: Harness-agnostic agent skills, pluggable into Claude Code, the pi coding agent, and others.

entry.title: impeccable
entry.content: Design fluency for frontend development. 1 skill with 23 commands (/impeccable polish, /impeccable audit, /impeccable critique, etc.) and curated anti-pattern detection.

entry.title: context-bazaar
entry.content: A typed, discoverable knowledge bazaar for AI coding harness configurations with Solr-backed semantic search — skills, powers, workflows, prompts, and agents for Kiro, Claude Code, Copilot, Cursor, and more.

entry.title: copilotkit
entry.content: AI agent skills for CopilotKit — setup, develop, integrate, debug, upgrade, and contribute to CopilotKit projects

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: automatised-pipeline
entry.content: Rust MCP server that indexes ANY codebase into a LadybugDB property graph — source in 10 languages with full AST, plus docs/config/binaries as File nodes (.js→Imports, Markdown→References). Resolves imports and call chains, detects communities via Leiden, traces execution flows from entry points, and exposes 24 MCP tools to agents — index_codebase, query_graph, get_symbol, get_impact, get_context, semantic_diff, and more.

entry.title: ratchet
entry.content: Verified, resumable engineering loops for Claude Code — audit a codebase into an acceptance-gated backlog, route each item to the right model, execute one verified commit at a time.

entry.title: agentic-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Agentic Awesome Skills with 1,896 supported skills.

entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Agentic Awesome Skills with 1,884 supported skills.

entry.title: huggingface-skills
entry.content: Core Hugging Face Hub operations through the hf CLI, including skill installation, repo management, jobs, datasets, models, Spaces, and discovery.

entry.title: pua
entry.content: Opt-in productivity coaching for Claude Code. Use for explicit PUA/try-harder requests, user frustration after repeated failures, requests to retry or change approach, passive/low-quality work complaints, completion checks, evidence requests, test/verification reminders, and Ding-style workplace process cues. Normal calm first-attempt requests are left alone.

entry.title: mattpocock-skills
entry.content: Matt Pocock's agent skills for real engineering — grilling, spec/ticket flows, TDD, code review, domain modelling and more. Plug-and-play, not vibe coding.

entry.title: minecraft-java
entry.content: Agent skills and an agent for driving a live Minecraft Java Edition world through the minecraft-java Fabric MCP mod. Includes a guided, step-by-step setup of the whole stack and an in-world builder agent.

entry.title: outlook-mcp
entry.content: Control Microsoft Outlook desktop on Windows (mail, calendar, tasks, notes) via the Win32 COM API

entry.title: session
entry.content: 汎用 Claude Code セッション管理プラグイン（spawn/fork/ready-compaction/enforce）

entry.title: ministr
entry.content: AST-level codebase understanding for AI coding agents — semantic search, symbol navigation, real reference graphs, and cross-language bridge detection across 40+ languages. Local-only.

entry.title: slideforge
entry.content: Official SlideForge integration: remote MCP server (streamable-http, OAuth or API key) + agent skills for slide/deck creation, deck inspect & repair, translation, and PDF extraction.

entry.title: thesmos-governance
entry.content: Code governance for AI-written code — 289 free rules (every BLOCKER + the AI-code safety net), diff-aware gating, and an MCP server. $79 one-time unlocks the full 1,137-rule engine and all 67 Pantheon agents.

entry.title: river-review
entry.content: Capability pack that strengthens AI review for Claude Code: your team's review criteria as versioned, repo-owned skills (a Skill Registry), driven by a review agent that runs perspective-based reviewer roles (code, security, performance, architecture, testing, adversarial) and verifies findings against the diff so humans keep the high-risk judgment.

entry.title: missioncache
entry.content: Fast MissionCache project management with time tracking, file operations, and MissionCache Auto loop integration. Replaces 5-10+ tool calls with single MCP calls.

entry.title: klaussy
entry.content: Claude Code boilerplate generator — scaffolds CLAUDE.md (path-scoped), namespaced .claude/skills/<repo>-<skill>/, settings, hooks, and PR template. Includes plugin-level klaussy-init and klaussy-update skills plus an MCP server.

entry.title: obsidian-forge
entry.content: Obsidian vault lifecycle management — inbox AI classification, graph strengthening, MOC regeneration, and multi-vault sync.

entry.title: nldd
entry.content: Bouw applicaties met het NLDD Design System (@nldd/design-system): de visie erachter en hoe je de web components goed gebruikt. Voor consumenten van het pakket, niet voor wie het systeem zelf onderhoudt.

entry.title: mumei
entry.content: Quality Enforcement Layer for Claude Code — Hook-gated SDD (spec & plan vehicles), Wave commits, and grounded multi-agent code review.

entry.title: patina
entry.content: Detect and rewrite AI writing patterns in Korean, English, Chinese, and Japanese so text reads as if a human wrote it. Meaning-preservation (MPS) verified, audit-friendly. The root SKILL.md is loaded as the /patina skill.

entry.title: mjsfx-sound-design
entry.content: Design retro / 8-bit game sound effects (and invent original ones) with the MJSFX app through its MCP tools — coins, lasers, explosions, jumps, power-ups, UI blips, cohesive sound families, and experimental textures

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills
entry.content: Plugin-safe Claude Code distribution of Antigravity Awesome Skills with 1,425 supported skills.

entry.title: skills
entry.content: skills — a plugin for Claude Code

entry.title: my-mac-claude
entry.content: Combined Claude skills library for macOS: Anthropic examples, Superpowers workflows, Matt Pocock skills, gstack browser-testing, and token-efficient profiles

entry.title: tdder
entry.content: Guides AI agents through disciplined coding practices. Language and build-system agnostic core with extensible language/build skills.

entry.title: anycloud
entry.content: Run AI workloads — training, fine-tuning, evals, batch inference — on the cheapest available cloud GPU across AWS, GCP, Azure, Lambda, CoreWeave, and other clouds. Multi-cloud BYOC; spot-aware with automatic preemption recovery.

entry.title: cloister-stale-sync
entry.content: Auto-invalidate ley-line-open's parse + LSP cache when Claude Code edits a file. Keeps lsp_hover/defs/refs/diagnostics fresh inside long sessions.

entry.title: context-mode
entry.content: MCP server that saves 98% of your context window with session continuity. Sandboxed code execution in 11 languages, FTS5 knowledge base with BM25 ranking, and automatic state restore across compactions.

entry.title: developer
entry.content: Build, integrate, and deploy applications on the Autonomi Network with verified guidance for the SDK, CLI, Direct Rust, and MCP paths.

entry.title: affiliate-networks-mcp
entry.content: Chat with your affiliate-network data in Claude through a local MCP server. 80+ publisher and advertiser-side adapters across the US, EU, Nordics, APAC and LatAm, most experimental.

entry.title: hyperclaude
entry.content: Push Claude Code beyond stock. Skills, agents, Codex collab — opinionated and personal.

entry.title: claudna
entry.content: Curated Claude Code skills, agents, and hooks — the canonical capability set of the Claudfather ecosystem.

entry.title: openclaw-docs
entry.content: Authoritative, daily-refreshed OpenClaw documentation lookup. Bundles a Claude skill (with local lookup CLI + flattened markdown indexes) and a hosted MCP server (vector + trigram search, structural field-check, section extraction, version listing). Use to ground OpenClaw factual claims and prevent hallucinated config fields.

entry.title: roborev
entry.content: Agent skills for roborev code review, fix, refine, and response workflows.

entry.title: duke-strategies
entry.content: Claude Code plugin for Duke Strategies branded deliverables

entry.title: korean-dart
entry.content: OpenDART 83개 API → 15개 MCP 도구. 금융감독원 전자공시(DART) 기반 AI 리서치 — 공시 검색·재무·XBRL + 버핏 애널리스트 프레임(insider_signal · disclosure_anomaly · buffett_quality_snapshot) + HWP/PDF 첨부 마크다운화

entry.title: beagle
entry.content: Code review skills and verification workflows for Python, Go, React, and AI frameworks

entry.title: agent-doctor
entry.content: flutter doctor for your AI coding stack — diagnose Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini CLI & more. Catches the silent failures.

entry.title: ai-founder-kb
entry.content: Queryable knowledge base of AI startup founder learnings, frameworks, and podcast transcripts. ~400 curated insights from 150+ founders + 1,600+ raw transcripts (Sequoia, 20VC, Dwarkesh, Acquired, Latent Space, Cheeky Pint, Cognitive Revolution, Lenny's).

entry.title: cancer-buddy
entry.content: 抗癌搭子 — CancerDAO's patient-facing AI cancer companion. A meta-skill plus companion sub-skills (record organize, nutrition, find-care, caregiver, education, disclosure, second-opinion, vault) that walk a patient and their family through the cancer journey. Does not perform mental-health screening or crisis intervention. Never fabricates medical facts; doctors, hospitals, trials, and citations must trace to a live source.

entry.title: quirk
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, typed artifacts, deep-research/brainstorming exploration with a user-involvement dial, and proven techniques

entry.title: project-lifecycle
entry.content: Doc-first per-phase workflow skill: brainstorm → spec → plan → execute → dual-track smoke → handoff → PR → milestone-done. Includes cost-aware behaviors (offset+limit reads, compact output flags, codemap pattern, RTK/token-savior adoption guidance).

entry.title: camunda-migration
entry.content: Claude Code skills for migrating Camunda 7 projects to Camunda 8

entry.title: cortex
entry.content: Syslog management via MCP

entry.title: heavyskill
entry.content: Heavy Thinking as the Inner Skill in Agentic Harness — spawns K independent parallel reasoning agents then performs critical sequential deliberation. Implementation of arXiv:2605.02396v1.

entry.title: claude-wayfinder
entry.content: Helps Claude make deterministic, auditable choices about which agent and skills to use for a given task — replacing prose-scanning agent/skill selection with a typed scoring kernel.

entry.title: iris-dev
entry.content: MCP server and skills for InterSystems IRIS development — 20 tools for live IRIS interaction plus 21 validated coding skills. Single binary, no Python required.

entry.title: wicked-interactive
entry.content: Interactive HTML & presentation builder with an in-browser feedback loop for non-technical business users. Build a draft, review it in the browser, highlight any block, attach plain-language feedback, and watch it regenerate live — with the supervising Claude session as the intelligence in the loop. Versioned, forkable, and exportable to self-contained HTML, PDF, native PowerPoint (PPTX), or video.

entry.title: its-hub
entry.content: Inference-time scaling for LLMs — generate multiple candidates and select the best using voting, scoring, or search

entry.title: mcpserver-grok
entry.content: Connect Grok CLI/TUI agents to McpServer for TODO management, session logging, requirements tracking, GraphRAG, and workspace continuity.

entry.title: planning-skills
entry.content: Turn fuzzy requests, messy transcripts, sketches, and partial designs into bounded planning artifacts that humans and agents can build from. Includes framing, appetite-aware shaping, explicit visual reconciliation, breadboarding, optional derived statecharts, interface contracts, executable breadboards, vertical task grouping, context packets, drift checks, and reflection.

entry.title: switchroom
entry.content: Operate switchroom — a multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code — from inside a Claude Code session. Adds slash commands (/switchroom:setup, /switchroom:start, /switchroom:stop, /switchroom:status) and skills for install, status, logs, config, restart, reconcile, schedule, and health.

entry.title: code-modernization
entry.content: Modernize legacy codebases (COBOL, legacy Java/C++/.NET, monolith web apps) with a structured preflight / assess / map / extract-rules / brief / (reimagine | transform | uplift) / harden / status workflow. Cross-stack rewrites, greenfield reimagining, and same-stack version uplifts (e.g. .NET Framework → .NET 8); an interactive topology viewer; specialist agents; and optional dynamic-workflow orchestration with adversarial verification.

entry.content: A clinical, pessimistic iteration loop implementing Disciplined Falsification Review to find terminal flaws in code, architecture, or designs. Assumes everything is broken until proven otherwise.

entry.content: Core development tools with 4 commands, 8 AI agents, 17 skills, 3 hooks, and 3 templates for productive modern web development

entry.title: sdd-workflow
entry.content: A unified plugin supporting AI-driven Specification-Driven Development (AI-SDD) workflow. Prevents Vibe Coding problems and achieves high-quality implementations using specifications as the source of truth. Supports multiple languages via SDD_LANG configuration.

entry.title: rashomon
entry.content: Evaluate prompts and skills through parallel execution comparison in git worktrees. Prompt optimization with BP-001~008 patterns, skill creation/update with quality grading, and blind A/B evaluation.

entry.title: wix
entry.content: Build, manage, and deploy Wix sites and apps. Includes CLI development skills and Wix MCP server for site management, eCommerce, CMS, dashboard extensions, and more.

entry.title: workflows
entry.content: Development, data science, writing, and workshop presentation workflows with TDD enforcement, output-first verification, agent team parallelization, and GSD-style deviation rules, test gap validation, and session handoff.

entry.content: Skills for Deep Learning (Keras 3), Reinforcement Learning (Python & C++), Prompt Optimization (Claude Opus 4.8), x402 Web3 Payments, and OpenClaw Setup.

entry.title: metalama
entry.content: Complete Metalama documentation for aspect-oriented programming and compile-time code generation in C#, covering aspects, T# templates, fabrics, architecture validation, and the Metalama.Patterns libraries (caching, contracts, observability). Use whenever writing, reviewing, or debugging Metalama code; when a build reports LAMA diagnostics or errors point into transformed/generated code; when asked to eliminate repetitive C# (logging, INotifyPropertyChanged, validation, retry, equality, builders) in a project that references Metalama packages; when configuring Metalama MSBuild properties; when testing aspects; or when migrating from PostSharp.

entry.title: waalaxy-copilot
entry.content: Waalaxy AI Copilot: a prospecting copilot with five capabilities — website positioning teardown, scored B2B targets, LinkedIn/Sales Navigator search URLs, LinkedIn profile optimization, and 3-message outreach sequences (plus CSV list cleaning) — with the Waalaxy MCP connector bundled so imports and campaign pushes work out of the box.

entry.title: antigravity-awesome-skills

entry.title: superpowers
entry.content: Core skills library for Claude Code: TDD, debugging, collaboration patterns, and proven techniques

entry.title: bridge
entry.content: Bridge gstack reviewed plans into Superpowers writing-plans format. Reads a gstack-approved plan, transforms it into a Superpowers-compatible implementation spec, then invokes superpowers:writing-plans.

entry.title: copilotkit
entry.content: AI agent skills for CopilotKit — setup, develop, integrate, debug, upgrade, and contribute to CopilotKit projects

entry.title: palladius-common-commands
entry.content: Riccardo's public Antigravity custom commands, GCP/SRE tools, and agent skills.

entry.title: kevin
entry.content: Talk like Kevin from The Office. Fewest words that carry the meaning. Governs prose only — code, commits, and PRs stay plain.

entry.title: destrier
entry.content: Generic code-improvement toolkit: review/debug skills, knowledgebase session workflow, git hooks, spec-driven development (spec-kit) with brainstorming + feature-to-issue bridges, and a bootstrap for gitnexus + roborev.

entry.title: gustavo-santos-skills
entry.content: Personal agent skills — workflow, engineering, product, design, mobile, communication, meta, operations

entry.title: ram
entry.content: Shared skills and hooks for RAM React/Supabase/Vercel projects

entry.title: green-keeper
entry.content: Keeps your tests and types green while you code — fixes red with minimal changes, maintains behavioral tests, and won't let you walk away from red. No fake-green.

entry.title: drawbar
entry.content: Lean, Linear-native design→plan→work→learn workflow with a per-project compounding knowledge base.

entry.title: exa
entry.content: Exa AI web search, deep research, and content extraction. Provides MCP tools and research skills for comprehensive web search, people discovery, company research, academic papers, and more.

entry.title: voip
entry.content: Make and receive phone calls via agents. Dial numbers, speak messages, hold AI-driven conversations, transcribe calls, and echo speech back over SIP/RTP.

entry.title: tldr
entry.content: Verdict-first communication mode. Cuts output tokens while keeping full technical accuracy.

entry.title: session-recall
entry.content: Shared semantic recall over local Claude Code and Codex session history. Bundles MCP search tools, a deep-recall subagent, a trigger skill, and a background freshness hook.

entry.title: devflow
entry.content: Make agentic coding work on real codebases: DevFlow takes a one-line request to a complete, tested, reviewed, documented PR that's ready for your final review, and improves itself weekly. Includes /devflow:implement (4-phase orchestrator), /devflow:review and /devflow:review-and-fix (a verification-checklist review engine that audits its own approval), the /devflow:docs suite, /devflow:create-issue, plus the self-improving retrospective loop (/devflow:retrospective per-PR + /devflow:retrospective-audit weekly).

entry.title: gograph
entry.content: Local Go repository intelligence for Claude Code: AST-aware call graphs, impact, security-flow candidates, and 61 query and analysis capabilities via the gograph MCP server.

entry.title: loopcraft
entry.content: Loop engineering for Claude Code — rubric+verifier self-correction, 5-stage memory protocol (fail→investigate→verify→distill→consult), autonomous backlog runner

entry.title: atl
entry.content: Mirror, edit, validate, and push Confluence pages and Jira issues with the atl CLI

entry.title: yggdrasil
entry.content: One shared, durable memory for your AI coding agents — local-first, zero-dependency. Decisions, lessons and status persist across sessions, tools and projects.

entry.title: seahorse-vm-setup
entry.content: One-command setup for a fresh seahorse GPU dev VM. Installs pixi + tooling, authenticates GitHub via browser device flow and AWS via SSO (no pasted secrets), clones seahorse, and runs the tested setup_vm.sh.

entry.title: yana-ai
entry.content: Personal agent operating system for Claude Code. Safety hooks, memory tiers, agents, commands, and cross-engine hard enforcement.

entry.title: googlenews-mcp
entry.content: googlenews-mcp

entry.title: server-monitor-mcp
entry.content: server-monitor-mcp

entry.title: FableCut
entry.content: FableCut

entry.title: vs
entry.content: Plan-to-ship workflow skills for shaping ideas, building autonomously, reviewing code, and shipping PRs with agent discipline.

entry.title: aaron-marketing
entry.content: 120 marketing skills and 8 commands as a four-layer operating system: Narrative strategy; SEO/GEO, Organic Social, Email, Paid Ads, and Influencer channels; Product Launch orchestration; and a Protocol layer with seven append-only truth registries plus non-canonical working memory. Eight typed advisory frameworks (TALE, CORE-EEAT, CITE, STAR, ECHO, SEND, ROAS, RAMP) use machine-checkable auditor artifacts and immutable standalone runtime contracts. Keyless-first and zero-dependency.

entry.title: agentcomm
entry.content: Multi-agent mailbox CLI — any git remote is a bus (git+ssh/github/sqlite/s3/gcs/postgres). register/send/inbox/wait/claim/log/channels so Claude coordinates with other agents or sessions; auto-selects the repo bus inside a git repo.

entry.title: tl-telar
entry.content: Agentic engineering framework for cross-platform apps: mobile (React Native, Flutter), web (Astro, Next.js, TanStack), Rust services, and desktop - 48 agents, 122 skills, 24 commands, 4 hooks, 7 rules, 29 scripts

entry.title: plan-runner
entry.content: Take a Markdown implementation plan, run it through a parallel agent swarm with per-wave verification, and generate a bug-fix plan for re-runs; TDD red-green mode on by default (--no-tdd to disable) with per-task red/green gate evidence; auto-detects Claude Code Agent Teams for token-lean orchestration with a subagent fallback. Tallies best-effort token usage for every dispatched subagent (analyzer, dev agents, verifiers, aggregator) into manifest.json token_usage with a grand total and honest coverage counters, surfaced in dashboards, an end-of-run per-phase Token Report with top consumers, and the PR stats; when the harness surfaces no usage figure for a subagent, each agent's own token_usage self-report (the last in-band harness figure, never an estimate) is used as a labeled lower-bound fallback. On the teams backend each wave is verifier-gated: the lead waits on the verifier's actual task result (never self-verifies) and a coverage gate before aggregation backfills any missing verdict, so a PR cannot open while a verifier is still outstanding. git is optional: when absent (no binary or not a repo) all git operations are skipped. Before opening the PR, syncs a code-atlas architecture index (runs /code-atlas:update when .code-atlas/ is present) so the index reflects what was implemented. Verification coverage is configurable via a .plan-runner.yml verify_mode (per-agent | per-wave | last-wave-only) or a --verify flag; lower modes verify fewer waves, record the rest as SKIPPED (distinct from UNVERIFIABLE), and force a draft PR with a banner. Final step opens or updates a proper PR via the plan-runner:pr skill (conventional title, rich body, draft when bugs remain).

entry.title: sprout
entry.content: Connect your AI agent to the Sprout MCP — author kid canvases and manage your family (tasks, gems, rewards, screen-time), plus bundled Sprout planning skills and the knowledge/design/examples docs they load.

entry.title: agent-kernel
entry.content: Local-first governance kernel for AI coding agents — shared memory, architecture conformance, rule distribution, approval inbox, episodic memory archive, MCP tools, hooks, and deterministic policy guards.

entry.title: daimon
entry.content: Dream-briefing for AI coding agents: a cognitive checkpoint at session end, a 'while you were away' briefing at session start.

entry.title: plot
entry.content: Git-native planning workflow for software development — idea, approve, deliver, release

entry.title: macaron
entry.content: Macaron artifacts for Claude Code and Codex — streaming GenUI builder, model switcher, and visual session manager.

entry.title: moszoro-skills
entry.content: Maciej Moszoro's personal Claude Code skills — verification-phase, qa-phase, cove, eli5, pixel-perfect-svg.

entry.title: ai-mentor
entry.content: Learn the Claude Code capabilities you didn't know existed. A discovery mentor that reads your setup, remembers what you already use, and teaches your highest-leverage gap — one demonstrated move at a time, grounded in your repo, never repeating itself.

entry.title: time-mcp
entry.content: Time/timer/alarm MCP server + /time command

entry.title: kshana
entry.content: Run the validated Kshana PNT-resilience engine from an AI agent — SGP4/SDP4, IAU frames, GNSS availability/DOP/ARAIM, Allan/MTIE timing, GNSS-INS fusion and quantum-sensor models. The agent calls the real, externally-validated engine instead of guessing the math. Requires the kshana-mcp server on PATH (cargo install kshana-mcp) or Docker.

entry.title: fns-build-factory
entry.content: FNS Build Factory — a complete client-acquisition build system: websites (Site Factory), funnels (Funnel Builder), cold email (Email Sequence Writer), GHL automation (GHL Workflow Generator), and full apps (Build Factory). Wired to the Parts Factory component MCP.

entry.title: solution-harness-plugin
entry.content: 앱팀 공통 harness-engineering 워크플로우 플러그인 V2 (Android / iOS) — 계획→TDD→검증→bug-fix 닫힌 루프

entry.title: tfstackplan
entry.content: tfstackplan CLI helper extension for managing Terraform state operations, plan visibility, and agentic workflows

entry.title: caliber-analysis
entry.content: Analyzes how your team uses Claude Code. Captures session activity — prompts, responses, and tool use — with secrets redacted on your machine before anything is sent, then ships it to your Caliber tenant for AI-governance insights. Bearer-authenticated, idempotent, and non-blocking.

entry.title: canon-core
entry.content: Always-on portable engineering rules (universal + Python tiers). A SessionStart hook injects the bundled rule modules into every session and warns loudly when a required module is missing.

entry.title: sdpm
entry.content: Spec-driven PowerPoint generation with a compose sub-agent (Claude Code).

entry.title: ai-handoff
entry.content: Automatic, integrity-checked handoff and verified memory recall between Claude Code and Codex.

entry.title: ai-employee-builder
entry.content: Public AI Employee Builder shell: auto-routing skill stubs + proactive hooks that connect buyers to the gated AIEB MCP server.

entry.title: gsd-core
entry.content: GSD Core is a meta-prompting, context engineering, and spec-driven development system for AI coding agents.

entry.title: jedymatt-skills
entry.content: jedymatt's personal Claude Code skills: coding-principles, architecting-principles, detecting-code-smells, git-town (with PR stacking), handoff/load-handoff, and writing-plain-english.

entry.title: myharness
entry.content: The team-architecture factory for Claude Code and Codex — a meta-skill that turns a domain description into an agent team and the skills they use, with six team patterns (Pipeline, Fan-out/Fan-in, Expert Pool, Producer-Reviewer, Supervisor, Hierarchical Delegation), a two-layer quality gate (internal QA + external codex/agy review), TDD/dev-rules doctrine injection, risk-tiered gates, and dual-runtime output (Claude Code + Codex). Claude Code·Codex용 팀 아키텍처 팩토리: 도메인 한 문장을 에이전트 팀+스킬로 변환하고, 내부 QA + 외부 리뷰 2층 게이트와 듀얼 런타임을 적용하는 메타 스킬.

entry.title: harness-kit
entry.content: A portable Claude Code engineering harness — plan → work → verify → feedback discipline as reusable agents, skills, and hooks, plus an `introspect` skill that tailors a .claude/ setup to any repo's tech stack.

entry.title: Titan
entry.content: Pensar, fazer e passar o bastão: cinco skills chamáveis individualmente. planejar (metodologia completa pra desenhar produto/software novo do zero antes de codar), auto-think (modo largar-e-esquecer pra ESTUDAR um problema difícil — pesquisa, estuda de vários ângulos, confronta os achados com o Codex, verifica e entrega uma ou mais soluções com veredito; não executa), auto-gptworker (modo largar-e-esquecer INVERTIDO: o Claude planeja/orquestra/revisa e o Codex é quem CONSTRÓI, mão na massa; borda sensível o Claude assume e para até autorização), handoff (gera documento de passagem de bastão pra continuar o trabalho numa sessão nova do zero) e gpt-optimizer (revisor adversarial on-demand via Codex GPT-5.6 que te faz refletir sobre uma decisão no meio da conversa — o GPT tenta derrubar, advogado do diabo; sem precisar de plano, PR ou código formal; quando o veredito é Seguir, oferece executar com a auto-gptworker). A auto-think estuda e recomenda; quem executa a solução escolhida é a auto-gptworker (Codex constrói, Claude revisa o diff). A planejar pode, no fim, oferecer disparar a auto-gptworker pra executar o plano — opcional, nunca automático. Repo-agnóstico — serve pra qualquer projeto.

entry.title: astrale
entry.content: Astrale CLI.

entry.title: agent-harness
entry.content: Portable AI agent harness — curated review/build/test agents, secret-hardening + worktree + plan-gate hooks, and spec/supervise/wrap/verify-completion skills. Install once, use in every project. AI-agnostic core (Claude Code / Codex / Gemini).

entry.title: llm-ux-benchmark
entry.content: Verilen siteyi sıfırdan vanilla static (HTML/CSS/JS) olarak yeniden kodlatır; Codex 0-100 puanlar (Teknik kalite / UI / Kod okunabilirliği), PageSpeed manuel girilir.

entry.title: somi
entry.content: Multi-agent engineering workflow system: plan, code, review — with SOLID/OWASP guardrails, deterministic hooks, and a global ruleset.

entry.title: spec
entry.content: Spec-driven development plugin: research → ask → propose → HARD GATE → apply → verify → archive, enforced by 4 hooks (TBD scan / approval gate / archive audit / verify reminder), with scope-dispatched dev agents and a fresh-context verifier agent

entry.title: audiobook-organizer
entry.content: Expert Claude Code assistance for the audiobook-organizer codebase — shared context loading, Go/DB/docs/PII specialist agents.

entry.title: swiftui
entry.content: Real production SwiftUI usage from 1,857 shipping macOS apps PLUS 33 macOS-SwiftUI skills (28 domain audits + write/modernize/scaffold) — all backed by the swiftui-ctx CLI. Look up how an API is really used and the consensus argument shape, flag deprecated calls, scaffold whole patterns, and run domain audits (accessibility, concurrency, state/observation, liquid glass, navigation, nativeness, and more) that ground every finding in real code with GitHub permalinks. Use before writing, reviewing, modernizing, or auditing SwiftUI on macOS.

entry.title: flywheel
entry.content: Pragmatic Growth workflow skills for Claude Code — define-goal (plain-language wants → measurable, red-teamed goal contracts), dispatch (one-goal-per-run orchestrator on the current branch with TDD-backed checks and a local build+test gate behind an independent second-view review), goals-status (read-only view of the open docs/goals queue), loop-architect (autonomous loop contracts), factory-doctor (one-pass preflight/doctor), and telegram-message (dispatch-gated Telegram DMs when a run errors, waits, or finishes). Ships three tool-restricted read-only subagents for the factory's review roles: gate-reviewer, fresh-check, and contract-red-team.

entry.title: governed-second-brain
entry.content: Bob's Big Brain — the governed team brain: cited recall, hash-chained receipts. ONE plugin, two modes. Local (default): turn your own files into cited (qmd://) memory with deterministic governance and a tamper-evident SHA-256 hash-chained audit trail, in-process with no runtime network after one-time native dependency provisioning. Team (set TEAMKB_API_URL): query your team's single governed brain over the tailnet with a per-user token.

entry.title: feature-forge
entry.content: End-to-end feature development pipeline: PRD → tech spec → implementation specs → backlog → documentation, with verification gates, pipeline state tracking, and specialized subagents for verification and codebase research.

entry.title: musicbrainz-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for MusicBrainz — search/browse music metadata, cover art, and submit tags, ratings, and collections

entry.title: devkit
entry.content: Local-dev coordination skills for devkit: file locks, ports, dev servers, issue lifecycle

entry.title: hermes-tweet
entry.content: Native Hermes Agent X/Twitter plugin for Xquik automation with read-first workflows and approval-gated actions. Not affiliated with X Corp.

entry.title: preludium-skills
entry.content: Personal skill library - curated Claude Code skills for compressed communication, code review, and development workflows.

entry.title: sidecar
entry.content: Project-agnostic AI coding sidecar — SELF-CONTAINED Claude Code plugin: governance hooks (guards + injects) AND the sidecar CLI itself (bin/ · cli/ · lib/ · modules/ · config/ · templates/ · styles/) ship as ONE unit. Hooks run the plugin's own bundled CLI via ${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}, so `/plugin update` + reload refreshes everything together — no per-project copy, no separate `sidecar self-update`. Slash commands ship as BARE `/cmd` via `sidecar shadow` (user-scope ~/.claude/commands), NOT plugin-namespaced — see `commands: []` below. Falls back to a global `sidecar` on PATH when present.

entry.title: beads-superpowers
entry.content: Superpowers skills + Beads issue tracking for Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, and 6 more AI coding agents. Composable skills + persistent task memory.

entry.title: embedded-debugger
entry.content: Embedded debugger workflow for probe-rs targets. Provides a CLI-first skill and optional MCP server for probe discovery, target checks, flashing, memory access, and RTT workflows.

entry.title: ai-agent-toolkit
entry.content: Source-first AI-agent toolkit with native Claude Code plugin metadata, English setup routing, Windows-safe hook repair, opt-in repo auto-update, and local bridge adapters.

entry.title: open-agent-hub
entry.content: Unified capability management center for Skills, Agents, and Commands.

entry.title: vibo-mcp
entry.content: MCP server for Vibo (vibodj.com) — plan & manage event music, song requests, ideas, guests, and playlists via natural language

entry.title: tim-skills
entry.content: Portable agent skills for engineering, research, teaching, and knowledge-base workflows.
